options.content:
## LiveAuction Production Overview
服务器真实链路观测：API health、Bid SLO、Redis Runtime、Projection、WebSocket fanout、DB/Redis Pool。

业务 Rejected 与系统失败分开看：Rejected 代表竞拍规则竞争，System Error/5xx 才进入故障判断。

panels.description: 入口请求按 result/reason 拆开，业务 rejected 不等于系统失败。
panels.title: Bid Requests by Result

targets.expr: sum by (reason) (rate(auction_bid_rejected_total{job=~"$job",reason!="access token expired, please refresh"}[$__rate_interval]) or label_replace(rate(auction_bid_rejected_total{job=~"$job",reason="access token expired, please refresh"}[$__rate_interval]), "reason", "AUTH_EXPIRED", "reason", ".*"))
